query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A group of young adults gather at a crowded indoor party on red carpeting. In the center, a man wearing glasses and a gray T-shirt embraces a woman in a gray hooded cardigan and long striped skirt, who turns toward the camera with an open-mouthed smile. To their left, a woman with reddish hair in a pink floral strapless dress holds a dark beverage in a plastic cup and touches her hair while laughing. Other attendees stand in the background holding drinks and conversing.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A group of young adults gather at a crowded indoor party on red carpeting, captured with the aggressively harsh direct flash and casual, unplanned energy of vernacular photography. In the center, a man wearing glasses and a gray T-shirt embraces a woman in a gray hooded cardigan and long striped skirt, who turns toward the camera with an open-mouthed smile, while the on-camera flash produces bright specular highlights and hard shadows. To their left, a woman with reddish hair in a pink floral strapless dress holds a dark beverage in a plastic cup and touches her hair while laughing. Other attendees stand in the background holding drinks and conversing, with partial figures and incidental limbs at the frame edges contributing to the informal snapshot aesthetic.
